notes: All changes are scoped to the existing constellation topology pipeline — no new modules, interfaces, or dependencies introduced
Instance count reduction (8/15 → 2/3), scale increase (0.3–0.7 → 1.2–2.0), and separation increase (0.8 → 3.0) are proportional parameter changes within existing generator infrastructure
Weighted topology selection replaces uniform random in pickTopologies() — same function signature, same PRNG contract, no API change
DEFAULT_SPREAD_RADIUS (2.5 → 3.5) and DEFAULT_MAX_TOPOLOGY_INSTANCES (10 → 3) are internal defaults only consumed by constellationLines.ts
Test updates are mechanical: adjusting hardcoded config values to match new ranges, plus 4 new acceptance-criteria tests
Risk of vertices exceeding fog far plane (uFogFar=8.0) is real but manageable — max extent is spreadRadius(3.5) + scale(2.0) × icosahedron radius(~1.0) = ~5.5, well within 8.0
PRNG determinism break is acceptable and expected for a visual rework ticket
No new shared interfaces, no cross-system coupling changes, no dependency additions
architecturalImpact: none — parameter tuning and weighted selection within existing generator/system boundary
